message: Jake
Yuriko
Jennifer
Fabar
Kristy
Boss, that’s amazing!
I can’t believe there’s a house here too; I’m super jealous!
Then you should seduce the director. If you play your cards right, you can become the director's wife and live here.
Ugh, I guess that's the only choice, huh?
Seriously, don’t actually do that.
Huh?　Why?
Just kidding.
Wow, I thought that was a valid opinion and was getting into it.
See

It doesn’t seem very lively, but everyone seems to be enjoying the party in their own way.
Film industry personnel have gathered. It seems they can't fully enjoy it since the shooting has been canceled.
It seems they are each pretending to be absorbed in conversation, but their minds are
not really engaged in the chatter.
They don't look like they're in the mood to enjoy the party anymore. Everyone seems uncomfortable.
She's wearing a bold dress that exposes her shoulders, which is quite unlike her usual style. I've seen
very few like this.
The light brownish-black hair goes quite well with the white dress. She doesn’t pale in comparison to the other women around her.
It seems she didn't really pay attention to the scene when Meryl jumped in. Unlike the others, she looks almost unchanged.
She appears to be carefully scanning the surroundings.
However, it's quite questionable what exactly is in her line of sight.
Compared to the previous parties, this feels really lonely.
Really lonely, huh?
Yeah, there are four people missing.
That's right. Meryl, Cindy, Gloria, and Patricia. I hear Patricia is off on some trip.
Is that so? Must be nice for students.
Right? I envy the student days.
But I'm kind of over the exams.
Boss, stop standing around and let’s go grab some food!
Boss.
Meryl just came in, right?
She seems really carefree.
Well, it’s not exactly carefree.
It's just that it felt so fleeting, I thought what happened a moment ago wasn't real.
Everyone is acting normally, so I started to wonder if it was just a dream.
It would have been nice if it were a dream.
Yeah.
I wonder what's up with Meryl.
Hehe, today I'm going to keep a close eye on her, just so you know!
Please make sure to be polite.
Don’t worry, after all, I’m a woman just one step away from being a great detective. Hehehe.
Tony definitely smells something!
Speaking of Tony, he was drinking alone when Meryl barged in, you know. That's kind of suspicious, right?
Why are you jumping to conclusions like that?
Because he was the only one looking all relaxed.
That's because Gai knows who the real culprit is.
Yeah, yeah.
As expected of the gray brain cells.
Kyaa, do you really think so?
Tony definitely seems suspicious. He’s the only one with a cool demeanor.
Directors really do make good money, huh? This place isn't cheap.
It's better to hear that straight from the director.
Ah, that's true.
But the director seems a bit low on energy, doesn't he? I guess the film being shelved hit him hard?
Maybe I'll go for the director after all.
Even though I thought about using seductive tactics on the director, it’s totally not working.
It's really annoying that it's getting in the way. Please do something about it.
That's not something you should say to me.
There's no one else here, right?
With the director,
there's
a gloomy atmosphere, isn't there?
Even though he's a grandpa,
he really knows how to
play around.
Guy seems so energetic it's hard to believe he's a captive. I seriously doubt he was really confined.
There was a press conference, wasn't there?
I don't know. Actually, they might have claimed he was under house arrest because he’s still under contract with Nets next season.
If Guy wasn't under house arrest,
what was he really doing and where?
It was tough for Guy too. I bet he was shocked, what do you think?
Well,
he looks fine, but he must be bewildered.
Hey. Why me?
You know.
Guy is probably having a rough year, you know.
It’s bad luck for Guy, isn’t it? I wonder why he’s so hated.
You’ve got new clothes that are all shiny, making it hard to get close. Especially with Guy around.
Well, it’s fine to go up to him anyway, right?
Chirp chirp, how uncouth.
Boss, with that attitude, you won’t get any attention.
I wish.
You look so happy.
Of course.
You really stood up for Guy, didn’t you?
Your feelings come out in a split second, after all.
Uh.
Hmm, but doesn’t she think she’s in danger in a situation like that?
Probably not, I mean, there’s no time to think.
Well, that’s true. It’s natural to protect someone right away.
Yeah.
You really must like Guy a lot.
Of course! Instead of talking to me,
you should just go to him.
But being all up close to the director is not a good look.
You don’t have to worry about that.
Oh, really? Sorry about that.
You’re actually curious, right? Boss.
Today’s...
Something feels off. Your expression is dark, and you’re too close to the director.
It seems like you’re really troubled.
Troubled, huh?
You don’t have to worry so much about her, do you?
But don’t you feel bad for the boss? It’s too much the way things are right now.
For just this kind of stuff,
Don't give up, okay?
Meryl, it was super scary!
What on earth happened?
I thought it was unlikely, but they really came to stab Gai.
Please don't say such laid-back things. It could have ended in panic.
It's because the media irresponsibly reported that Gai is the culprit that it turned into this mess.
That's true. But surprisingly, everyone seems calm.
Aren't people kind of used to this sort of thing? It feels almost like a play.
I wonder if everyone thinks it's just some little show.
I think the culprit might be among us at this party.
What's your basis for that?
Well, Eva, Cindy, and Ginny's missing persons cases. All three are connected to someone here.
That's true. But just because of that, it doesn't mean there’s a culprit among us.
Really?
I think definitely one of us is.
Am I being annoying?
I really thought so. The culprit is in this group.
You shouldn't say things like that. If someone else hears this conversation...
What basis do you have for such a claim?
My brilliant sixth sense is tingling.
Boss, you're being pretty dense.
I might have the talent, actually.
In your case, your hit rate is low. You decide someone is the culprit just by looking at their face.
Ah, that's harsh!
No way, that's not true!
Is that so? It seems that way to me.
Let’s observe a bit longer. There's definitely something here.
This,
is it?
Oh, what a lovely key!
Unfortunately, it's not mine. What's this about?
After the chaos with Meryl, it had fallen right at my feet.
The owner must be in a bit of a bind, huh? At this size, it looks like the key for the front door.
Should we ask everyone?
※※※ It's a bug ※※※
Ｖ＝
Ｎ＝
